'''Mynar Devis''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as an officer in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the last years of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and afterward. He was the illegitimate son of [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] and [[Hallena Devis]].

==Biography==
At the time of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Devis served as the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the ''[[Wrack]]'', an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor cruiser]]; he was also trained as a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]. From the age of five, he enjoyed listening to tales told about [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and his famous [[Starship/Legends|starship]], the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']].

In the wake of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]'s crippling of the [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] during [[Second Battle of Bilbringi|Operation Trinity]], Devis personally led the ''Wrack''{{'s}} complement of [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defenders]] to aid the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] forces at the Second Battle of Bilbringi. Devis defended the ''Millennium Falcon'' during its escape from the battle and, when the Vong appeared to be gaining the advantage, crashed his fighter into the enemy [[Vua'spar interdictor]], sacrificing himself.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]'' {{Mo}}
